title: Bars
description: Makes a lot of the Gui stuff in to bars
body:
##  Makes a lot of the Gui stuff in to bars, this includes:  
• health bar  
• hunger bar  
• armour bar  
• exp bar  
• vehicle bar  
• jump bar  
• attack indicator  
### **preview**
![Bars preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec45de96e9b8277255b62bccbeddd827494a6ce3.png)
